title: What's New on MedlinePlus
text:
022
New Medical Test Added to MedlinePlus
A new medical test is available on MedlinePlus:Â 
Parainfluenza Tests 
Parainfluenza tests diagnose four common viruses that cause respiratory illnesses, including croup and bronchitis. 
September 22, 2022
New Health Topic Added to MedlinePlus
A new health topic was added to MedlinePlus:Â 
Post-COVID Conditions (Long COVID) 
Anyone who had COVID-19, whether is was severe or mild, can have long-lasting symptoms. Learn more about Post-COVID conditions (long COVID), including symptoms, diagnosis, treatments, and prevention.
August 11, 2022

These pages are an introduction to fundamental topics related to human genetics, including illustrations and basic explanations of genetics concepts.
August 4, 2022
Genetic Pages Available in Spanish
Four new chapters of Help Me Understand Genetics are now available in Spanish:
Genetics and Human Traits ( GenÃ©tica y rasgos humanos ): Are dimples inherited? Are moles genetic? Discover the answers to more questions about genetics and human traits. 
Direct-To-Consumer Genetic Testing ( Pruebas genÃ©ticas directas al consumidor ): Learn about at-home genetic testing. Topics include how to choose a test, risks and benefits, testing costs and more.Â
